# SafeVault .github config

## Templates
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md` - Bug reports
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md` - Feature requests
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/question.md` - Questions
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` - Pull requests

## Workflows
- `workflows/ci.yml` - Continuous integration (lint, test, build)
- `workflows/release.yml` - Automated releases

## Other
- `FUNDING.yml` - Sponsorship (optional)
- `dependabot.yml` - Dependency updates (optional)
